revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_AmCyc%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Purpose === This template facilitates the citation of articles from editions of ''[[:en:The American Cyclopædia|The American Cyclopædia]]''. Links to Wikisource or external sources are provided for. {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} is used for the implementation. === Usage === {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=''put the name of the AmCyc article here''}} or with a specification of additional options: |noicon =''1'' — no leading icon |vb =''1'' — prescript to attribute copied text (see [[WP:PLAGIARISM]]) |inline =''1'' — alters the prescript to make it suitable for inline citations |wstitle=''name of the AmCyc article on Wikisource'' |display=''alternative name to display in place of the AmCyc article name on Wikisource'' |title=''name of the AmCyc article if not on Wikisource'' |url=''only set if title= is set'' |year= —defaults to 1879. For the following parameters see the documentation of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}} |first= |last= |author= |authorlink= |volume= |page= |pages= |ref= |mode= === Examples === ====Simple==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} ====With comment==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von}} A German historian and activist for freedom of the press. ====Using noicon==== {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Cogniet, Leon|noicon=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|wstitle=Rotteck, Karl von|vb=x}} ====Using title (no Wikisource link)==== {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} displays as: {{Cite AmCyc|title=Rotteck, Karl von}} When title is being used, url can be used to specify an external link. === Hidden categories === This template places articles into a hidden category with sub-categories to aid maintenance: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from The American Cyclopaedia]] === See also === * {{tlx|AmCyc}} — for use in a Wikipedia article that includes text copied from the AmCyc article * {{tlx|AmCyc poster}} — display an AmCyc article in a top box on the right. * [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Wikimedia sister projects]] === Notes === {{reflist|group="note"}} {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Amcyc Cite}} }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
